recommendations.title: It's Now or Never
recommendations.overview: Narrates the preparation for a wedding of a Spanish couple in which everything goes wrong.

recommendations.title: Hedgehog in the Fog
recommendations.overview: A little hedgehog, on the way to visit his friend the bear, gets lost in thick fog, where horses, dogs and even falling leaves take on a terrifying new aspect...

recommendations.title: A Dog's Journey
recommendations.overview: A dog finds the meaning of his own existence through the lives of the humans he meets.

recommendations.title: Windstorm
recommendations.overview: While spending the summer at her grandmother's farm, a girl discovers a talent for communicating with horses and tries to tame a fierce stallion.

recommendations.title: Black Beauty
recommendations.overview: Born free in the American West, Black Beauty is a horse rounded up and brought to Birtwick Stables, where she meets spirited teenager Jo Green. The two forge a bond that carries Beauty through the different chapters, challenges and adventures.

recommendations.title: The Lion King II: Simba's Pride
recommendations.overview: The circle of life continues for Simba, now fully grown and in his rightful place as the king of Pride Rock. Simba and Nala have given birth to a daughter, Kiara who's as rebellious as her father was. But Kiara drives her parents to distraction when

recommendations.title: English Vinglish
recommendations.overview: In the United States for the first time, an Indian housewife with a limited command of English turns Manhattan into her personal language school.

recommendations.title: The Watermelon Woman
recommendations.overview: A young black lesbian filmmaker probes into the life of The Watermelon Woman, a 1930s black actress who played 'mammy' archetypes.

recommendations.title: Feast
recommendations.overview: This Oscar-winning animated short film tells the story of one man's love life as seen through the eyes of his best friend and dog, Winston, and revealed bite by bite through the meals they share.

recommendations.title: Chaplin
recommendations.overview: An aged Charlie Chaplin narrates his life to his autobiography's editor, including his rise to wealth and comedic fame from poverty, his turbulent personal life and his run-ins with the FBI.
